SF Superior Court Pipeline

Scrape and Sync Monitor

Live view over local scrape coverage, local process health, and HF sync status.

Coverage panels merge cached HF day summaries with local progress. The case-prefix panel remains local-only.

Scope 2020-2025
Updated -
Local Data -

Local Scrape Service

-

HF Sync Service

-

Combined HF + Local Calendar

Darker cells mean fewer cases left to scrape. The calendar also distinguishes untouched dates and dates that were attempted but never resolved into saved day data.
